title: cirsium lampophyllum
intro: Cirsium lampophyllum, also known as the Spanish thistle or prickly thistle, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is rich in saponins, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Cirsium lampophyllum has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe digestive issues.
